tagline: Yesterday's good news, bright and early.

stories.headline: Against All Odds: Italian Cyclist Conquers Darkness to Win Giro d'Italia Stage
stories.summary: After battling illness and despair, Longo Borghini roars back to victory with tears streaming down her face, proving she never lost her will to fight.

stories.headline: Grandfather's Love Blazes Brighter Than Fire: Saves Eight Grandchildren and Son
stories.summary: Umar Sidee, 66, rushed through smoke and explosions to save his eight grandchildren and son from their burning two-story home, getting everyone out safely.

stories.headline: From Last Place to Champion: 20-Year-Old Praggnanandhaa Wins Norway Chess
stories.summary: Twenty-year-old Praggnanandhaa won Norway Chess after climbing from last place, then beat Chennai's Chief Minister at chess for a Rs 50 lakh prize.

stories.headline: Zverev's Dream Fulfilled: German Star Finally Wins Grand Slam After Three Heartbreaks
stories.summary: Alexander Zverev, 29, finally won his first Grand Slam at Roland Garros after three devastating final losses, collapsing to the floor when his father raised his arms in celebration.

stories.headline: Eight-Year-Old Organizes Walk to Stop Violence, Raises $2,400 for Her Community
stories.summary: Eight-year-old Phoebe Leer organized a community event that raised $750 for the Sto-Rox Community Violence Reduction Initiative after attending a basketball event.

stories.headline: From 94th Place to Champion: Golfer Poston Stages Stunning Memorial Tournament Comeback
stories.summary: J.T. Poston won the Memorial Tournament in sudden-death playoff, sinking a 4-foot par putt on the 18th hole to beat Ryan Gerard.

stories.headline: The Sea's Elusive Star: Scientists Find Rare Sunflower Sea Stars, Restoring Hope for Kelp Forests
stories.summary: Scientists discovered 18 sunflower sea stars in California, signaling hope for the kelp forests and marine life that depend on these rare creatures.

stories.headline: Personalized mRNA Vaccine Cuts Melanoma Recurrence Nearly in Half
stories.summary: A groundbreaking new cancer vaccine paired with immunotherapy offers real hope, reducing skin cancer recurrence risk by almost 50% after five years.

stories.headline: Mangrove Forests Make Surprising Comeback, Storing Carbon and Saving Lives
stories.summary: Mangrove forests have been gaining since 2010 and now store five times more carbon than land forests while protecting millions from storms.
